prompt: How do I make a basic drum beat in Strudel with a kick, snare, and hi-hats?

assertions.description: Uses the s() or sound() function for drum sounds
assertions.check: Response includes s("...") or sound("...") with drum abbreviations

assertions.description: Uses standard drum abbreviations bd, sd, hh
assertions.check: Response mentions or uses bd (kick), sd (snare), and hh (hi-hat)

assertions.description: Shows how to play parallel patterns with comma
assertions.check: Response demonstrates the comma separator for parallel patterns
Response contains a working Strudel code snippet in a code block
